title: Slice JSON schema export
goal: Add khazad-doom slices schema and a committed JSON Schema for editor validation.
acceptance: slices schema prints the Issue Slice JSON Schema.
The schema includes verify_profile and verify_timeout_seconds.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
